div.p: ADC Principle: The query $q$ stays in full precision (float32). Only stored database vectors $x$ are quantized. This avoids quantization error on the query and enables the high-speed LUT scan.

ol.li: Compute full L2 distance Complexity: O(d) ops
M Lookups + M-1 Additions Complexity: O(M) lookups

div.p: 96x Reduction in Compute 768 float ops -> 8 lookups
